name: agent-sessions-sync
description: Keep your AI agent sessions (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor) synchronized across all of your computers via your own private GitHub repository.

agentSessionsSync.agents.claude.path.markdownDescription: Local Claude Code sessions directory. Leave empty for the default `~/.claude/projects`. Supports `~`.

agentSessionsSync.agents.claude.projectP.markdownDescription: Map Claude Code project folders in the repository to the project's directory on **this** machine, so sessions synced from machines with different project paths show up in `claude --resume`. Keys are folder names under `claude/` in the repository (another machine's encoded project path), values are local project directories (supports `~`). Prefer the **Agent Sessions Sync: Map Claude Project Folder** command — it also moves already-downloaded sessions. A mapping stays inactive while a local sessions folder with the repository name still exists.

agentSessionsSync.agents.codex.path.markdownDescription: Local Codex sessions directory. Leave empty for the default `~/.codex/sessions`. Supports `~`.

agentSessionsSync.agents.cursor.path.markdownDescription: Local Cursor sessions directory. Leave empty for the default `~/.cursor/chats`. Supports `~`.

agentSessionsSync.autoSync.description: Automatically synchronize sessions on startup, on file changes and periodically. When disabled, use the 'Sync Now' command.

agentSessionsSync.pollIntervalMinutes.description: How often (in minutes) to check the remote repository for changes made on other devices.

agentSessionsSync.debounceSeconds.description: How long to wait after a local session file change before syncing (debounce). Sessions are written continuously while an agent runs, so keep this generous.

agentSessionsSync.freshMinutes.description: Session files modified within this many minutes are considered actively in use and are skipped in both directions until they settle. 0 disables the check.

agentSessionsSync.maxFileSizeMB.description: Session files larger than this are not synchronized (GitHub blobs are limited to 100 MB).
